summary: CRITICAL: Deliverable is incomplete and non-functional. Missing files: tests/secret-rotation-validator.bats (core TDD requirement), fixtures/secrets-basic.json, fixtures/secrets-all-expired.json. Workflow will fail immediately—references non-existent files and doesn't chmod +x script. Main script (secret-rotation-validator.sh) is well-structured (clear sections, good error handling, proper quoting) but lacks JSON config validation and has fragile string-concat JSON building. Test harness (run-act-tests.sh) makes incorrect assumptions about act output format ('Job succeeded' doesn't appear). Violates core TDD requirement: no failing test written first. Only 1 test case stubbed; no .actrc provided. Script is readable with good function names and comments, but entire testing infrastructure is broken.
